title: Unsupervised Memory-Enhanced Video Transformers: Obstacle Detection for Autonomous Agricultural Rover
abstract: arXiv:2606.26151v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: While autonomous rovers have become indispensable to precision farming, achieving consistent operational safety remains a critical challenge. Conventional safety sensors, such as LiDAR, fail to detect obstacles positioned below the plant canopy, posing a significant risk. While camera-based supervised learning methods can detect common objects, they perform poorly when faced with obstacles that were not present in their training data. Actual unsupervised anomaly detection offers a solution by learning the normal visual patterns of an environment, but often fails for the dynamic scenes captured by a moving rover.\\ This paper introduces Video Memory Transformers for Anomaly Detection (VMTAD), a fully unsupervised method designed for real-time obstacle detection in dynamic agricultural scenes. VMTAD utilizes a transformer-driven architecture augmented with a dedicated memory module. This memory module leverages temporal context by proces

Title: Unsupervised Memory-Enhanced Video Transformers: Obstacle Detection for Autonomous Agricultural Rover
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26151v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: While autonomous rovers have become indispensable to precision farming, achieving consistent operational safety remains a critical challenge. Conventional safety sensors, such as LiDAR, fail to detect obstacles positioned below the plant canopy, posing a significant risk. Actual unsupervised anomaly detection offers a solution by learning the normal visual patterns of an environment, but often fails for the dynamic scenes captured by a moving rover.\\ This paper introduces Video Memory Transformers for Anomaly Detection (VMTAD), a fully unsupervised method designed for real-time obstacle detection in dynamic agricultural scenes. translated_title: 无监督记忆增强视频变换器：面向自主农业巡视车的障碍物检测
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26151v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：虽然自主巡视车已成为精准农业中不可或缺的工具，但实现持续的操作安全仍是一个关键挑战。传统的安全传感器，如激光雷达，无法检测到位于植物冠层下方的障碍物，这带来了显著风险。基于摄像头的监督学习方法可以检测常见物体，但在面对训练数据中未出现的障碍物时表现不佳。实际的无监督异常检测通过学习环境的正常视觉模式提供了一种解决方案，但通常难以应对移动巡视车捕获的动态场景。本文介绍了视频记忆变换器用于异常检测（VMTAD），这是一种完全无监督的方法，专为动态农业场景中的实时障碍物检测设计。VMTAD利用一种增强有专用记忆模块的变换器驱动架构。该记忆模块通过处理时序上下文来利用时间信息。
tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督视频记忆变换器（VMTAD），通过记忆模块增强时序上下文处理，解决了农业巡视车在动态场景中检测未知障碍物的难题。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes an unsupervised Video Memory Transformer (VMTAD) that enhances temporal context processing with a memory module, addressing the challenge of detecting unknown obstacles in dynamic agricultural scenes for autonomous rovers.
